settings.name: DropThresholdPercent
settings.comment: The nutrient threshold (0.0 to 1.0) below which drops become probabilistic. If nutrients are above this, soil is guaranteed.

settings.name: MinDropChance
settings.comment: The minimum guaranteed drop chance (0.0 to 1.0) even if nutrients are 0%. Set above 0 for a forgiving mode.

settings.name: PreserveOriginalTier
settings.comment: If true, drops the soil block corresponding to the farmland's ORIGINAL TIER, regardless of current nutrient level. Different from 'Farmland Drops With Nutrients' which preserves nutrient values.

settings.name: AlwaysDrop
settings.comment: If true, always drop soil regardless of nutrient levels. Bypasses all chance calculations.
